name: Perfection Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. For the crust: In a bowl, combine flour and salt. Add Crisco shortening and cut in with a pastry blender or two knives until mixture forms pea-sized chunks.
3. Gradually add water and mix lightly with a fork until dough forms a ball. Press into a 5- to 6-inch circle on a floured surface and roll out to fit an upside-down 9-inch pie plate. Carefully transfer the rolled dough into the pie plate, trimming off excess over the edge.
4. Fold the edges under and flute as desired.
5. For the filling: In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar until light. Add eggs one at a time, then mix in syrup and vanilla extract. Stir in pecan halves.
6. Pour filling into the prepared pie shell.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 5 minutes. Reduce heat to 325°F (165°C) and bake for an additional 45 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the pie to cool to room temperature before cutting and serving. Makes one 9-inch pie.
